_comment: Simulator scenarios. Each is (verb × subject_type × env × optional --as). The Rust dumper produces simulator/demo-plans.json[id]; the JS planner must match. Covers all three emergent behaviors plus preference, override, multi-hop, and a 415.

scenarios.title: view image · cosmic-terminal
scenarios.subject: image/png
scenarios.shows: preference: ansi chosen over the cheaper surface

scenarios.title: view image · piped/redirected
scenarios.subject: image/png
scenarios.shows: byte sink: identity, raw image bytes

scenarios.title: summarize text · bare terminal
scenarios.subject: text/plain
scenarios.shows: Using: selection → fabric/inference (assemble's prompt can't reach a text sink)

scenarios.title: keys of a CSV · bare terminal
scenarios.subject: text/csv
scenarios.shows: input coercion → csv2json before the verb

scenarios.title: keys --as surface · bare terminal
scenarios.subject: application/json
scenarios.shows: 415: no display → no surface-capable converter (honest refusal)

scenarios.title: open JSON · bare terminal
scenarios.subject: application/json
scenarios.shows: application/json is_a text/plain → shows as text, no converter needed

scenarios.title: open PDF · desktop
scenarios.subject: application/pdf
scenarios.shows: xdg-open catch-all (*/* → surface) — the real desktop fallback

scenarios.title: open PDF · bare terminal
scenarios.subject: application/pdf
scenarios.shows: 415: a PDF can't be shown in a bare terminal (no path to ansi/text)
